scenario.name: sub
scenario.send: SUBSCRIBE sip:[presentity]@localhost SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[subscriber]@localhost>;tag=[call_id] To: <sip:[presentity]@localhost> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 SUBSCRIBE Contact: <sip:[subscriber]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 60 Event: presence Accept: application/pidf+xml Content-Length: 0
